feed.title: Veterinary and Biological Informatics Lab
feed.subtitle: Applying computing to better understand health phenotypes and animal diversity

entry.title: Example News Post With Tagged Members

link.title: Example News Post With Tagged Members

entry.content:
This example post shows how to tag additional lab members in a news post so the post also appears on their bio pages.

Use the people: front matter field with member slugs from _members/.
entry.summary: This example post shows how to tag additional lab members in a news post so the post also appears on their bio pages.
